_comment: JBS Vibe Editing project config — read by the vibe CLI, the UI server and the capability engines. VIBE:GENERATED {{VIBE_VERSION}}
_agent: Which agent CLI drives this project: auto | claude | codex. 'auto' picks Claude Code when installed, else Codex CLI.
_uiPort: Port for `vibe ui` (override per-run with --port or VIBE_UI_PORT).
_language: Default language for transcription hints and generated copy (ISO 639-1). Your brand/brand.json tone.language wins for copywriting.
_maxRenderJobs: How many renders may run at once (GPU lane). Raise only if your GPU has headroom.
_minFreeGb: Renders refuse to start when free disk falls below this (also VIBE_MIN_FREE_GB).
